segments.text: Part 1
MAN: Good morning.
segments.translation: 男人：早上好。

segments.text: SHELLEY: Hi. This is Shelley Mayer.
segments.translation: 谢莉：你好，我是谢莉・梅耶。

segments.text: I'm renting your house on Archwood Avenue. I'm due to move in next week.
segments.translation: 我要把你在亚齐伍德大道上的房子租出去。我下周就要搬进去了。

segments.text: MAN: Oh yes, hello Ms Mayer. What can I do for you?
segments.translation: 男人：哦，是的，您好，梅耶女士。我能为您做些什么？

segments.text: SHELLEY: When I viewed the house, I told you I'll most probably need to rent some furniture – at least until I know whether my temporary work contract is going to be made permanent.
segments.translation: 谢利：当我看房子的时候，我告诉过你我可能需要租一些家具 —— 至少在我确定我的临时工作合同是否会变成永久合同之前。

segments.text: MAN: Yes of course, I remember. And I said I could give you some information about furniture rental companies in the city.
segments.translation: 男人：是的，我当然记得。我说过我可以给你提供一些关于城里家具租赁公司的信息。

segments.text: SHELLEY: That's right.
segments.translation: 谢利：没错。

segments.text: MAN: Well, the biggest company is called Peak Rentals.
segments.translation: 男人：嗯，最大的公司叫峰值租赁公司。

segments.text: I've recommended them to other people and have always heard positive reports about them.
segments.translation: 我一直向其他人推荐他们，也总是听到关于他们的积极评价。

segments.text: SHELLEY: Could you give me an idea of their costs?
segments.translation: 谢利：你能告诉我他们的成本是多少吗？

segments.text: MAN: Sure, I actually have one of their brochures here.
segments.translation: 男人：当然，我这里其实有一本他们的小册子。

segments.text: It says the monthly price per room starts at a hundred and five dollars and goes up to two hundred and thirty-nine dollars – that depends on which rooms you need furniture for, of course.
segments.translation: 上面说每间房间的月租金从 105 美元起，最高可达 239 美元 —— 当然，这取决于你需要哪些房间的家具。

segments.text: SHELLEY: Sure. It's just to get a general idea of how much it's gonna cost.
segments.translation: 谢利：当然。只是想大致了解一下要花多少钱。

segments.text: And you said you had some positive feedback about this company.
segments.translation: 你说你对这家公司有一些积极的反馈。

segments.text: MAN: Yes, people have mentioned that the furniture from Peak Rentals is more modern than any of the other companies.
segments.translation: 男人：是的，人们已经提到，Peak Rentals 的家具比其他任何公司都更现代化。

segments.text: And also, once you place an order, the furniture will be delivered to you in just one or two days.
segments.translation: 而且，一旦你下了订单，家具就会在一两天内送到你手中。

segments.text: SHELLEY: That would be really helpful.
segments.translation: 谢利：那真的会很有帮助。

segments.text: MAN: Oh, and the brochure says that there's a special offer at the moment.
segments.translation: 男人：哦，小册子上说现在有特别优惠。

segments.text: If you rent living room furniture – I believe that's a set of chairs and a TV table, you'll also get a lamp at no extra cost.
segments.translation: 如果你租用客厅家具 —— 我记得是一套椅子和一张电视桌，你还可以免费获得一盏台灯。

segments.text: SHELLEY: OK. But, you know, that price range you gave is more than I was hoping to pay.
segments.translation: 谢利：好的。但是，你知道吗，你给的价格范围比我希望支付的要高。

segments.text: MAN: Then you could try Aaron and Oliver.
segments.translation: 男人：那你可以试试亚伦和奥利弗。

segments.text: SHELLEY: Sorry, what and Oliver?
segments.translation: 谢利：抱歉，那奥利弗呢？

segments.text: MAN: Aaron. Double-A-R-O-N.
segments.translation: 男人：亚伦。双 A-R-O-N。

segments.text: SHELLEY: OK. Are they cheaper?
segments.translation: 谢利：好的。他们更便宜吗？

segments.text: MAN: I'd say they're a mid-price company.
segments.translation: 男人：我会说他们是一家中等价格的公司。

segments.text: But if you chose them, you need to be aware that they charge an extra twelve per cent every month in case of damage.
segments.translation: 但如果你选择他们，你需要知道，他们每月会额外收取 12% 的费用，以防损坏。

segments.text: SHELLEY: Oh I see. I'd have to do the math carefully then.
segments.translation: 谢利：哦，我明白了。那我得仔细算算了。

segments.text: MAN: Right. But one helpful thing is that they also do cleaning for customers.
segments.translation: 男人：是的。但有一件有用的事是，他们也为客户做清洁。

segments.text: SHELLEY: For the furniture?
segments.translation: 谢利：家具呢？

segments.text: MAN: For the house.
segments.translation: 男人：为了房子。

segments.text: SHELLEY: Oh I see. I probably won't need that.
segments.translation: 谢利：哦，我明白了。我可能不需要那个。

segments.text: MAN: There's another company called Larch Furniture.
segments.translation: 男人：还有另一家公司叫拉奇家具。

segments.text: It's quite new, and it has the lowest prices in town.
segments.translation: 它相当新，而且价格是城里最低的。

segments.text: That's for both furniture and also electronic equipment.
segments.translation: 这包括家具和电子设备。

segments.text: SHELLEY: Well that would be good.
segments.translation: 谢利：那样就好了。

segments.text: I'm not bringing much with me, and I won't have much time to go shopping after I start my job.
segments.translation: 我不会带太多东西，而且开始工作后我也没有太多时间去购物。

segments.text: MAN: There are two things you need to know about Larch Furniture.
segments.translation: 男士：关于拉奇家具，你需要了解两件事。

segments.text: First of all, you have to take out insurance on the furniture, and you need to organise that yourself.
segments.translation: 首先，你必须为家具投保，而且你需要自己组织这件事。

segments.text: SHELLEY: That wouldn't be too hard.
segments.translation: 谢利：那不会太难。

segments.text: MAN: Also, you can't take out a contract for less than six months, but I fgure that might not be a problem for you.
segments.translation: 男人：还有，你不能签订少于六个月的合同，但我猜这对你来说可能不是问题。

segments.text: You're renting the house for twelve months after all, aren't you?
segments.translation: 毕竟，你要把房子租出去十二个月，不是吗？

segments.text: SHELLEY: Yes. OK, well I …
segments.translation: 谢利：是的。好的，那么我......

segments.text: MAN: … sorry to interrupt. I just thought of another furniture rental company.
segments.translation: 男人：...... 抱歉打断一下。我只是想到了另一家家具租赁公司。

segments.text: It's called Space Rentals. And it's located very near to the house.
segments.translation: 它叫太空租赁。而且它离房子很近。

segments.text: SHELLEY: OK.
segments.translation: 谢利：好的。

segments.text: MAN: I don't have any information about their charges, so it's best to use their app to find out what it would cost you to use them.
segments.translation: 男人：我没有任何关于他们收费的信息，所以最好使用他们的应用程序了解一下使用他们的成本。

segments.text: SHELLEY: OK thanks. I'll do that.
segments.translation: 谢利：好的，谢谢。我会这么做的。

segments.text: MAN: One good thing about that company is that if you don't like the furniture once it's delivered, you can request exchanges – as long as you do that within a week of receiving it.
segments.translation: 男士：那家公司的一个好处是，如果你在收到家具后不喜欢，可以要求更换 —— 只要你在收到后的一周内这样做。

segments.text: SHELLEY: That sounds really great. OK. Well thanks very much. That's so helpful …
segments.translation: 谢利：这听起来真的很棒。好的。非常感谢。这真的很有帮助......
